title: GemLogin Anti-detect Browser
starting: GemLogin is starting browser... may take 30–90 seconds, please wait.
startDescription: Click Start to open GemLogin profile (pre-logged in). Then scrape data directly — no cookie configuration needed.
startTooltip: Open GemLogin profile ID=1. CDP URL will auto-inject into scraper.
closeDescription: Browser will close. Scraper will no longer use GemLogin.
started: GemLogin started — ready to scrape data
